## Type of Change

- [ ] New panel
- [ ] Panel enhancement
- [ ] Keyboard shortcut
- [ ] Bug fix

## Pre-Merge Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Tested in terminal (launch `cast-dash` and verify panels render)
- [ ] No hardcoded paths (use `$HOME` or `~/`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
